summary: Wrote 163 tests for suite-core/core/attack_simulation_engine.py covering all public classes, methods, and edge cases. Tests achieve 92.74% line coverage (target was 60%), all 163 pass in 21.3 seconds.
issues: Python 3.14 broke asyncio.get_event_loop() in non-async contexts — fixed by using asyncio.new_event_loop() in the run() helper.

_get_llm() lazy-loads the real LLMProviderManager even when engine._llm=None, causing live HTTP calls. Fixed by patching _get_llm with patch.object(engine, '_get_llm', return_value=None) in the two affected tests.
